name: Srividhya Sridhar
title: Ph.D. Candidate (Stage II)
bio: I am a Ph.D. candidate in Mechanical Science and Engineering at UIUC, advised by Prof. Shelby Hutchens. My research focuses on mechanical failure of soft polymeric materials—combining experiments such as Y-shaped cutting, needle insertion, and fractography with optical profilometry to relate fracture, friction, and surface morphology.
